Join ACOG Quick Links for Members MyACOG Renew Your Membership Member Benefits CME and Transcripts Membership Support Districts and Sections 2026 ACOG Annual Clinical & Scientific Meeting Washington, D.C. | May 1-3, 2026 Featured Education Payment in Practice: Foundations in Coding Compassionate Conversations Making a Difference in Women’s Health We’re working to improve and strengthen women’s health care around the world with programs dedicated to global health, social issues, advocacy, and more. Learn More About Our Programs Long-Acting Reversible Contraception (LARC) Supporting clinicians in providing evidence-based, patient-centered, and justice-informed contraceptive care and increasing access to long-acting reversible contraception. Immunization, Infectious Disease, and Public Health Preparedness The Immunization, Infectious Disease, and Public Health Preparedness Program aims to enhance health throughout the lifespan by providing clinicians and patients with guidance and educational resources to increase knowledge of vaccines, infectious diseases, and emerging issues. Implementing Progress in Abortion Care and Training (IMPACT) The IMPACT Program seeks to improve access to abortion care in the U.S., by providing hands-on clinical and operational support training, along with web-based resources and expert technical assistance.
